org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli

Class ErsapShell.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.std.cli.ErsapShell.Builder
  • Enclosing class:
    ErsapShell

    public static class ErsapShell.Builder
extends java.lang.Object
    Helps configuring and creating a new ErsapShell.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Builder(org.jline.terminal.TerminalBuilder termBuilder)
      Creates a new builder.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ErsapShell build()
      Creates the user-interactive ERSAP shell instance.
      ErsapShell.Builder withBuiltinCommand(CommandFactory factory)
      Adds a new builtin command to the ERSAP shell session.
      ErsapShell.Builder withBuiltinCommand(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String description, java.util.List<java.lang.String> command)
      Adds a new builtin command to the ERSAP shell session.
      ErsapShell.Builder withBuiltinCommand(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String description, java.lang.String... command)
      Adds a new builtin command to the ERSAP shell session.
      ErsapShell.Builder withConfiguration(java.util.function.Consumer<Config.Builder> consumer)
      Customizes the configuration variables of the shell session.
      ErsapShell.Builder withEditSubCommand(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String description, java.util.function.Function<Config,java.nio.file.Path> fileArg)
      Adds a new subcommand to the edit builtin command.
      ErsapShell.Builder withRunSubCommand(CommandFactory factory)
      Adds a new subcommand to the run builtin command.
      ErsapShell.Builder withScript(java.nio.file.Path script)
      Sets the script to be executed by the shell in non-interactive mode.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Builder

        public Builder(org.jline.terminal.TerminalBuilder termBuilder)
        Creates a new builder.
        Parameters:
        termBuilder - the builder of the virtual terminal

    • Method Detail

      • withConfiguration

        public ErsapShell.Builder withConfiguration(java.util.function.Consumer<Config.Builder> consumer)
        Customizes the configuration variables of the shell session.
        Parameters:
        consumer - a function that updates the configuration builder
        Returns:
        this builder

      • withRunSubCommand

        public ErsapShell.Builder withRunSubCommand(CommandFactory factory)
        Adds a new subcommand to the run builtin command. This new subcommand cannot have the same name as one of the default subcommands.
        Parameters:
        factory - the factory to create the subcommand
        Returns:
        this builder

      • withEditSubCommand

        public ErsapShell.Builder withEditSubCommand(java.lang.String name,
                                             java.lang.String description,
                                             java.util.function.Function<Config,java.nio.file.Path> fileArg)
        Adds a new subcommand to the edit builtin command.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the subcommand
        description - the help description for the command
        fileArg - the path to the text file to be edited
        Returns:
        this builder

      • withBuiltinCommand

        public ErsapShell.Builder withBuiltinCommand(java.lang.String name,
                                             java.lang.String description,
                                             java.util.List<java.lang.String> command)
        Adds a new builtin command to the ERSAP shell session. This new command cannot have the same name as one of the default builtin commands.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the command
        description - the help description for the command
        command - the list containing the program and its arguments
        Returns:
        this builder

      • withBuiltinCommand

        public ErsapShell.Builder withBuiltinCommand(java.lang.String name,
                                             java.lang.String description,
                                             java.lang.String... command)
        Adds a new builtin command to the ERSAP shell session. This new command cannot have the same name as one of the default builtin commands.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the command
        description - the help description for the command
        command - a string array containing the program and its arguments
        Returns:
        this builder

      • withBuiltinCommand

        public ErsapShell.Builder withBuiltinCommand(CommandFactory factory)
        Adds a new builtin command to the ERSAP shell session. This new command cannot have the same name as one of the default builtin commands.
        Parameters:
        factory - the factory to create the command
        Returns:
        this builder

      • withScript

        public ErsapShell.Builder withScript(java.nio.file.Path script)
        Sets the script to be executed by the shell in non-interactive mode.
        Parameters:
        script - the script with commands to be executed by the shell
        Returns:
        this builder

      • build

        public ErsapShell build()
        Creates the user-interactive ERSAP shell instance.
        Returns:
        the created shell
